name: Drop Scones (Bakestone Recipes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour into a mixing bowl and stir in the sugar.
2. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and add the egg.
3. Gradually stir in the milk until you have a creamy batter. The thicker the batter, the thicker the pancakes will be.
4. Heat the bakestone and lightly grease it.
5. Using a large spoon, drop rounded portions of batter onto the bakestone, leaving space between each for spreading.
6. Cook over moderate heat until the top surface is covered with bubbles and the underside turns golden.
7. Turn the scones using a spatula and cook on the other side until golden.
8. Remove from the bakestone and wrap in a cloth.
9. Serve immediately with butter, honey, and preserves. If any are left for later, crisp them under the grill before serving.
10. Alternatively, you can rub 1 ounce of butter into the flour and sugar mixture or add six drops of lemon essence to the batter.
